title: Parthathila Parthathila Lyrics Diwan
stanzas:
engalukku therinjathellaam
enga durai singamaiyyaa
aezhu kodi jananga nenjil
yaethi vacha deepamaiyyaa

andha vaanatha pola
thevaraiyyaa
emma kaathu nikkum
durai singamaiyyaa

thennavaru konjam
kai asaichaa
andha kadal ala kooda
adangumadaa

nallavaru oru vaartha sonna
enga naatu sanathuku
adhu vedhamadaa

enga saami paecheduthaa
kottaiyellaam kulungumada
avar paadha manneduthu
poosikittaa vetriyadaa

edhir pola sutterikkum
neruppirukkum kangalada
oru podhum thottradhilla
muukulathu singamadaa

mugamthaane paathirukom
avar ullangaiyya
paarthathilla
enga saami seiyyum
tharmathukku
endha imaiyam kooda
eedu illa

engalukku therinjathellaam
enga durai singamaiyyaa
aezhu kodi jananga nenjil
yaethi vacha deepamaiyyaa

thevaraiyyaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Parthathila Parthathila conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the vibrant spirit of the characters in Diwan.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

This song is featured during a lively celebration scene in Diwan, highlighting the festive atmosphere.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by S.A.Rajkumar, known for his energetic music style.

When was the song released?

Parthathila Parthathila was released on August 22, 2003.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Parthathila Parthathila, the lively beats and energetic vocals by S.A.Rajkumar create an atmosphere of celebration and joy. The song plays during a festive moment in Diwan, encapsulating the spirit of togetherness and happiness. Its catchy lyrics and upbeat rhythm evoke feelings of excitement and enthusiasm. This track is perfect for any party or celebration, making it a memorable highlight of the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Parthathila Parthathila from Diwan is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, showcasing S.A.Rajkumar's dynamic vocals. This song captures the essence of joy and festivity, making it a perfect anthem for any celebration. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, it's sure to get everyone on their feet!
stanzaMeanings: In this place, we see the essence of life and the moments that matter.
We don't know much, but our leader is strong; seven crores of people have their hearts lit up.
Like that sky, our leader stands tall and protects us.
In this place, we see the essence of life and the moments that matter.
The king has come here, is it a sweet celebration?
If the people from the south stretch their hands, will the sea also stop?
If good people say a word, is that not like a scripture for our land?
If the strong people shed a tear, will the victory songs not rise?
Our leader has spoken, and everything will flourish; his footsteps will lead to success.
The brave Pandya warriors are like the sun in this sky.
In this place, we see the essence of life and the moments that matter.
Even if they say they own the land, the mountains still remain.
Even if they speak like a breeze, will the brave light not be inside?
The Vaigai river flows for the love of many, and the great ocean holds it all.
In the sky, they think, and the lightning strikes for love.
Like a fire that burns, will the eyes not see the truth?
We have seen their faces; they have not seen our leader's actions, and there is no way to measure the righteousness he brings.
In this place, we see the essence of life and the moments that matter.
We don't know much, but our leader is strong; seven crores of people have their hearts lit up.
Like that sky, our leader stands tall and protects us.
